import { spec, specId, verifies } from "@libar-dev/software-delivery-protocol";

export const createOrderSpec = spec({
  id: specId("spec:orders.create-order"),
  title: "Create order",
  kind: "behavior",
  altitude: "feature",
  readiness: "idea",
  intent: { outcome: "Turn a valid cart into an order." },
});

// A workflow spec declaring verifies: the relation is authored freely, but only an
// example/scenario can be an enabled verifier (MD-7), so it confers no has-verifier — the
// verifies-linkage check surfaces it informatively, never as a gate.
export const reconciliationWorkflowSpec = spec({
  id: specId("spec:orders.reconciliation-workflow"),
  title: "Reconciliation workflow claims to verify order creation",
  kind: "workflow",
  altitude: "story",
  readiness: "idea",
  intent: { outcome: "Show a non-example verifier surfacing informatively." },
  relations: [verifies(specId("spec:orders.create-order"))],
});
